name: Optimizing tf-features Rust batch extraction for lowest runtime

description: baseline setup with ignored Rust benchmark; crash due to PyO3 picking unsupported system Python 3.14 during cargo test build
baseline Rust benchmark harness for tf-features with fixed PyO3 interpreter selection
move Rust benchmark harness and checks onto dedicated autoresearch branch with pinned PyO3 Python interpreter
optimize function word detection by replacing per-call lookup map construction with inline match helpers
attempt single-pass Unicode metrics computation; crash from stale formality helper signature mismatch
try single-pass Unicode metrics scan; runtime regressed slightly and gain is negligible, so discard and stop per user preference
reuse precomputed char and token buffers across bigram and trigram extraction in ngram pipeline
attempt to reuse lexical tokens for word ngrams in hot path; regressed badly, likely due different token shape or less favorable allocation patterns
optimize ASCII token flush path with in-place lowercase and mem::take in lexical and ngram tokenizers; result essentially unchanged so discard
specialize char and word bigram/trigram string construction to avoid generic collect and join overhead in hot ngram paths
